note: AUD5 fix for finding F-11 (docs/novakai/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: test-authoring — the AUD3-missing deny fixtures ARE the fix (T6).

intent.problem: AUD3 T6: coverage.mjs, exports-coverage.mjs and validate.mjs had NO test — their 'exit 1' deny claims were proven only by running on good data in CI, so a mutation disabling any of them was invisible.
intent.approach: completeness.test.mjs (in the suite), all via real spawned CLIs: an uncovered source file -> 1 then covered -> 0 (coverage); a hidden export -> 1 then allowlisted -> 0, on a self-contained ts-morph fixture project (exports-coverage); a grammar error (edge to undefined node) -> 1, valid -> 0, no arg -> 2 (validate).
intent.rationale: the exact three deny cases the register names; allow/deny pairs prove the gates discriminate rather than always-fail.
